hero.subtitle: Smart appointment management software for barbers, hair salons, beauty centers and clinics. SMS & WhatsApp reminders, staff management and financial reports — all in one platform.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: in one platform
features.description: All the tools you need to grow your hair salon or beauty business, in one place.
features.f1_desc: Your clients can book 24/7 online. Conflict prevention, staff schedules and gap management on one screen — phone traffic drops to zero.
features.f2_desc: AI automatically replies to WhatsApp and Instagram messages, shows available slots and creates appointments. The system works while you sleep.
features.f3_desc: Booking confirmation, 24-hour and 2-hour reminders are sent automatically. Cancellation rates drop by an average of 30%, revenue growth felt in the first month.
features.f4_desc: Daily, weekly and monthly income/expense tracking. Staff performance, most popular services — make data-driven decisions.
features.f5_desc: All data is stored encrypted. GDPR-compliant infrastructure, SSL certificate and regular backups.
features.f6_desc: Separate calendar for each staff member, performance tracking and leave management. Prevent conflicts, balance workload.

pricing.title: Choose the right plan
pricing.subtitle: The Starter plan includes a 3-day free trial. Professional and Business plans start with direct payment. Cancel anytime.
pricing.extra_sms: Extra 250 SMS for +₺300/mo · Prices include VAT
pricing.addon_subtitle: Add to any plan. Automatically reply to WhatsApp and Instagram DMs with AI, take bookings.

footer.tagline: Smart appointment system for hair salons and beauty businesses.

ozellikler.h1: Everything you need in hair & salon software, all in one platform
ozellikler.subtitle: From online booking to financial reports, SMS reminders to customer CRM — all the tools to grow your salon.
ozellikler.cta_subtitle: 3-day free trial. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

hakkimizda.h1: We are digitalising the beauty industry
hakkimizda.subtitle: Hemensalon is a technology company founded to simplify appointment management for barbers, hair salons, beauty centers and clinics.
hakkimizda.cta_subtitle: 3-day free trial. No credit card required.
